overview: House of Hormones offers personalized hormone optimization and weight loss programs including nutrition plans, exercise routines, and hormone replacement therapy. Initial 45-minute consultations are followed by monthly telemedicine follow-ups and 24/7 text support.
highlights: Monthly telemedicine follow-ups with 24/7 text support
targetAudience: Adults seeking hormone optimization and weight loss support, including those with thyroid issues, PCOS, and other hormonal imbalances.
